title: Supervise irrigation system installation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise irrigation system installation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

pcs.text: Develop employment and contract management procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop employment and contract management procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop employment and contract management procedures.
